tools.description: Trace how a value propagates through a function using the decompiler's PCode graph. Direction 'backward' walks producers (Varnode.getDef); 'forward' walks consumers (Varnode.getDescendants). Terminates at constants, parameters, call boundaries, or max_steps. Phi (MULTIEQUAL) nodes are summarized rather than recursed. On programs with multiple address spaces, prefix addresses with the space name (mem:1000).
tools.category_description: Completeness analysis, control flow, similarity, crypto detection, memory inspection

params.name: address
params.description: Address inside the target function where the value is observed. Accepts 0x<hex> or <space>:<hex>.

params.description: Anchor selector. Register name (EAX, RCX), HighVariable name (param_1, local_14, iVar1), or empty to use the PcodeOp output at the address.

params.name: direction
params.description: 'backward' (producers) or 'forward' (consumers).

params.name: max_steps
params.description: Cap on nodes visited. Default 20, max 200.

tools.description: Bulk merge: copy ALL RE documentation from one program to another at matching addresses, in a single server-side transaction. Categories: function names + signatures + plate comments + locals + calling convention + no-return + tags; standalone data types; data definitions (typed globals); plate comments at any address; comments at all 4 types (EOL/PRE/POST/REPEATABLE) on instructions AND data; labels & globals (with namespace preservation); external locations (ordinal renames); bookmarks; equates. Designed for the orphan-rescue workflow: source is typically '<name>_recovered', target is the original '<name>.dll'. Idempotent — re-running on an already-merged target only fills gaps. Set dry_run=true to count without writing.
tools.category_description: Function hashing, cross-binary documentation, undocumented function discovery
